name: Memory (Deja Vu)
description: Deja Vu memory backend for OpenClaw — platform (dejavu.ai cloud) or self-hosted open-source. Auto-recall and auto-capture are opt-in (disabled by default). Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama (fully local), Qdrant, and PGVector providers.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Required for platform mode. Get your key at https://app.dejavu.ai/dashboard/api-keys?utm_source=oss&utm_medium=openclaw-plugin
Self-hosted mode using OpenAI for LLM and embeddings
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: OpenAI API key for OSS LLM

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Fully local mode, no API keys needed
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: Ollama base URL for local LLM

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: "platform" for Deja Vu cloud, "open-source" for self-hosted

apiKey.label: Deja Vu API Key
apiKey.help: Platform mode only. Use a SecretRef ({"source":"env","provider":"default","id":"VENICE_API_KEY"}) or ${VENICE_API_KEY} instead of storing the key directly.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation context after each agent turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: Only store user preferences and important facts...
customInstructions.help: Natural language rules for what Deja Vu should store or exclude (platform mode)

customCategories.label: Custom Categories
customCategories.help: Map of category names to descriptions for memory tagging (platform mode only). Sensible defaults are built in.

customPrompt.label: Custom Prompt (Open-Source)
customPrompt.help: Custom prompt for open-source mode memory extraction.

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1). Default: 0.3

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve

userEmail.label: User Email
userEmail.help: Email address associated with the Deja Vu account. Set automatically during platform login.

oss.label: Open-Source Configuration
oss.help: Optional. Configure custom embedder, vector store, LLM, or history DB for open-source mode. For API keys in sub-provider configs, use SecretRef objects or ${VAR} syntax instead of plaintext values.

oss.llm.config.apiKey.label: OSS LLM API Key
oss.llm.config.apiKey.help: API key for open-source LLM provider. Use SecretRef or ${VAR} syntax.

oss.embedder.config.apiKey.label: OSS Embedder API Key
oss.embedder.config.apiKey.help: API key for open-source embedder provider. Use SecretRef or ${VAR} syntax.

skills.label: Agentic Memory Skills
skills.help: Enable skills-based memory extraction. The agent controls what to remember (triage), how to recall (recall), and periodic cleanup (dream). Disables auto-capture when active.

mode.description: Required. 'platform' requires VENICE_API_KEY. 'open-source' requires OPENAI_API_KEY (default) or no keys with Ollama.

apiKey.description: Platform API key. Prefer SecretRef or ${VENICE_API_KEY} env var over plaintext.

userEmail.description: Email associated with Deja Vu account. Set automatically during platform login.

autoCapture.description: When true, extracts durable facts after each agent turn. Enabled by default. Ignored in skills mode.

autoRecall.description: When true, injects relevant memories before each agent turn. Enabled by default. Ignored in skills mode.
